ogTitle: Castle Forbes Bay vs Caveside: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Castle Forbes Bay and Caveside.
heading: Castle Forbes Bay vs Caveside — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Castle Forbes Bay, Tasmania and Caveside, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caveside has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Castle Forbes Bay (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Castle Forbes Bay or Caveside safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Castle Forbes Bay has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Caveside scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Castle Forbes Bay scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Caveside scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Castle Forbes Bay or Caveside?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caveside has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
